title: Ketu mantra
intro: Ketu Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Ketu.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Sram Shreem Shraum Sah Ketave Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to Lord Ketu,
who has a smoky appearance
and removes
all obstacles.

faq.q1: When should Ketu Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Ketu Mantra may be chanted in the morning or as advised according to traditional astrological practices.
faq.q2: How many times should Ketu Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Ketu Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Ketu Mantra is believed to support spiritual growth, mental peace, positive energy, and the blessings of Ketu.
faq.q4: Can Ketu Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Ketu Mantra may be chanted daily with devotion.
faq.a5: Yes, anyone can chant Ketu Mantra with faith and devotion.
